Hi Rakesh Patel,

This is a summary of your employee purchase eligibility within the PaperShare system.

The approved item for your purchase is a **Lenovo Laptop**, specifically the standard specification as defined by the IT department.

Please note that **approval is required** for any purchase you wish to make.

If you have any questions or require further clarification regarding your eligibility or the approval process, please feel free to contact the HR or IT department.

Best regards,
